holdings.infoBox: IXJ is an equity ETF with a total of 135 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 11.39%, Johnson & Johnson at 7.23%, AbbVie at 4.98%, UnitedHealth Group at 4.85%, and Roche Holding AG at 3.76%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Healthcare ETF (IXJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global health care companies. IXJ was launched on Nov 13, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P Global 1200 Health Care Sector Capped Index

data.title: Biden calls IRA ‘one of the most significant laws' ever as he promotes climate investments
data.text: President Joe Biden on Wednesday marked the first anniversary of his Inflation Reduction Act, a massive package of climate and healthcare initiatives that is part of his broader “Bidenomics” program.
